468 MENTL_STUS_CHG_ADMSN_CD MENTL_STUS_CHG_ADMSN_CD Delirium: Acute Onset Mental Status Change (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents whether there Is evidence of an acute change in mental status from the patient's baseline at the time of admission. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
469 MENTL_STUS_CHG_DSCHRG_CD
